---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement for SADS
title: '[ENHANCEMENT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Describe the Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Describe the new model, physics simulation, or user interface element.

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, design mockups, or literature references (e.g. SMAD section) about the feature request here.
